# Verl-Tool Runtime Subset

This directory contains the modified Verl-Tool runtime used by
AgentGuard-Zero's multi-turn LoRA/GRPO training path. Unused tool servers,
examples, tests, and task-specific reward managers are omitted.

Upstream project: https://github.com/TIGER-AI-Lab/verl-tool

License: MIT. See `../VERL_TOOL_LICENSE`.
